title: Gaga purpusii

The classification of Gaga purpusii is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta. Gaga purpusii is also known to be a member of the order Asterales.

intro: Gaga purpusii, also known as Oaxacan Gold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and respiratory issues. Gaga purpusii contains bioactive constituents like sesquiterpene lactones, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties.
